APP.TITLE: Modern personal finance forecasts
APP.SUBTITLE: Project every account, simulate new projects, and stay audit-ready with clean dashboards powered by React, TanStack Query, and Recharts.

PLAYBOOKS.TITLE: Scenario playbooks
PLAYBOOKS.DESCRIPTION: Model one-off purchases, recurring expenses, and tax buffers.

QUALITY.TITLE: Quality toolchain
QUALITY.DESCRIPTION: Vite, Vitest, RTL, Storybook, Husky, and GitHub Actions baked in.
